text: Visit prompted by overdue checkup and medication review notice from clinic
transcript_quote: The clinic called about a checkup being overdue, and the letter mentioned a medication review too.

text: Patient reports feeling 'wound tight' with poor sleep and racing thoughts, primarily about finances
transcript_quote: I have been wound so tight lately

text: Patient reports difficulty sleeping with mind running about money
transcript_quote: I do not sleep great. My mind runs — money, mostly.

text: Patient reports intermittent fluttery chest sensation attributed to worry, which fades with sleep
transcript_quote: Some nights my chest gets this fluttery feeling.

text: Denies chest pain with activity, shortness of breath, fainting, or swelling
transcript_quote: No, nothing like that. Physically I am healthy as a horse.

text: Continues hydrocortisone cream for skin flares
transcript_quote: The cream for when my skin flares up

text: Continues loratadine tablet for seasonal allergies, taken most days in spring
transcript_quote: the pill most days in spring

text: Continues epinephrine auto-injector kept in purse; never used
transcript_quote: the EpiPen lives in my purse

text: Allergy to animal dander causing sneezing and hives
transcript_quote: Animal dander sets me off

text: Aspirin allergy/intolerance confirmed
transcript_quote: I cannot take aspirin

text: No recent allergic reactions; never had to use EpiPen
transcript_quote: Never used it, knock on wood.

text: History of recurrent urinary tract infections; denies current urinary burning, urgency, or blood
transcript_quote: No, I have been clear for a good while.

text: Periods regular; no chance of pregnancy status post tubal ligation

slots.detail: post tubal ligation, prior pregnancy loss

transcript_quote: I had my tubes tied after my youngest.

text: GAD-7 score of 7, consistent with mild anxiety
transcript_quote: The anxiety score was a seven — that is the mild range

text: PHQ-2 depression screen score of 0; not depressed
transcript_quote: The depression screen was a zero — stressed but not down.

text: HARK domestic abuse screen positive with score of 2 (marked yes on humiliation and afraid items)
transcript_quote: You marked yes on two.

text: Patient is victim of intimate partner emotional/verbal abuse; partner verbally demeaning when drinking, has punched a wall twice; no physical violence toward patient or children
transcript_quote: when he has been drinking, the things he says... He cuts me down to nothing.

text: Patient reports feeling scared and heart pounding when partner gets loud; takes children to bedroom
transcript_quote: when he gets loud I take the kids to the bedroom, and I notice my heart pounding and I am... scared

text: Patient denies being in immediate danger this week; no physical contact by partner
transcript_quote: No. Not danger-danger. He has never touched me or the kids.

text: DAST-10 substance screen score of 2; occasional nighttime cannabis use for stress relief
transcript_quote: the substance questions scored a two

text: Occasional cannabis use at night for relaxation
transcript_quote: Some nights, after everyone is asleep, I smoke a little weed

text: Never smoked tobacco
Lungs clear, heart regular rate and rhythm on exam
transcript_quote: lungs are clear, heart is regular and unhurried

text: Blood pressure 108/77 mmHg
transcript_quote: one-oh-eight over seventy-seven

text: Heart rate 67 /min
transcript_quote: pulse sixty-seven

text: Weight 91.4 kg
transcript_quote: Weight came in at ninety-one point four kilos

text: BMI 30.57 kg/m2 (obese range)
transcript_quote: the math puts your BMI just over thirty

text: Respiratory rate 16 /min
Body height 172.9 cm
Pain severity score 1/10
Influenza vaccine (split virus, trivalent, PF) administered today
transcript_quote: And one shot today — the flu vaccine.

text: Referral placed to community dental clinic (sliding scale/Medicaid) for overdue dental care
transcript_quote: I am putting in a referral to the community dental clinic

text: Provided confidential domestic violence hotline number, written discreetly per patient preference
transcript_quote: There is a confidential domestic violence hotline — I can write the number small, no label

text: IPV documented in chart with patient's permission for care coordination
transcript_quote: I will also note this in your chart, which is confidential

text: Counseled on cannabis safety: never before driving and keep locked away from children
transcript_quote: never before driving, and keep it locked away from the kids

text: Counseled that walking is free and helps anxiety and weight when time permits
transcript_quote: walking is free and it helps the anxiety at least as much as the waistline

text: Follow-up appointment in about one month for anxiety and self-care
transcript_quote: I want to see you back in about a month

text: Advised to call or walk in without appointment if situation at home worsens or fear escalates
transcript_quote: if anything at home changes, if the fear gets bigger, you call or you walk in

text: Household crowding: 8 people living at address after sister and her children doubled up due to housing loss
transcript_quote: There are eight of us in the house right now.

text: Financial stress: patient laid off from diner during pandemic, partner's hours cut, relying on unemployment; low annual family income (~$10,131)
transcript_quote: I got laid off from the diner when everything shut down, my partner's hours got cut, and unemployment barely covers groceries

text: High stress level reported on PRAPARE assessment
transcript_quote: I am... braced. All the time.

text: Insurance is Medicaid
Barrier to dental care: cost prohibitive, has not seen dentist in years
transcript_quote: Dental costs real money, and the kids' teeth come first.

text: Domestic abuse screening procedure completed
Assessment of anxiety completed
Assessment of substance use and drug abuse screening completed
Assessment of health and social care needs completed
Patient has social support: sister aware of the abuse situation
transcript_quote: My sister knows some of it already, so I am not alone in the house with it
